title: Assorted Colors 21 Hole Ice Cube Tray - Easy Fill & Durable Material - Perfect for Your Summer Drinks & Parties (1 Pc.)
features: VARIETY OF COLORS: Choose from three assorted colors - grey, pink, and cream - to add a touch of style to your ice-making experience. Note: The package includes 1 random-colored 21-hole ice cube tray.

EASY TO CLEAN & FILL: The user-friendly design allows for a hassle-free filling and emptying process, and it's simple to wash by hand or in the dishwasher, making it a convenient addition to your kitchen.
REUSALE & DURABLE: Made from high-quality, durable material, this ice cube tray is designed to last, providing you with countless refreshing beverages and a more sustainable, eco-friendly option.
PERFECT SUMMER ESSENTIAL: Elevate your summer drinks and delight your party guests with perfectly-sized ice cubes from this versatile, 21-hole ice cube tray.

BOOST YOUR PARTY GAME: Ideal for summer get-togethers, BBQs, and cocktail parties, the assorted colors 21 hole ice cube tray enhances your beverage presentation, making for a memorable hosting experience.
description: Presenting our assorted colors 21 hole ice cube tray, an essential tool for your summer refreshments and social gatherings. Crafted from robust and durable material, this tray is designed to withstand numerous freezing cycles. It features an easy-fill design with 21 holes, allowing you to quickly and conveniently produce plenty of ice cubes for your drinks. Available in a variety of vibrant colors, it adds a fun and festive touch to your kitchen accessories. Whether it's a backyard pool party or a casual gathering, our 21 hole ice cube tray ensures your beverages remain chilled, enjoyable, and refreshing. (1 pc.)
